title: env var parse failures warn+default instead of bail: operator misconfiguration silent
description: main.rs: KEEPALIVE_SECS, SUBSCRIPTION_DAYS, RATE_LIMIT_MSG_PER_MIN, and DIRECTORY_EXPIRY_DAYS all warn and use defaults on parse failure. An operator who sets KEEPALIVE_SECS=30s or RATE_LIMIT_MSG_PER_MIN=unlimited silently gets defaults. Consistent policy: either all parse errors bail (safest) or all warn. Currently SUBSCRIPTION_PRICE_ZATOSHI=0 bails but =invalid silently defaults — the inconsistency will generate issue reports from operators who never saw the warning.
